name: Sculpted Foliage Cream Ceramic Planter - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of artisanal charm to your home decor with this Sculpted Foliage Ceramic Planter from Threshold™. This planter is designed in a cream hue and features a sculpted design to bring timeless elegance to your space. Use this planter to house your favorite plants or flowers and place it on the tabletop or mantel for an eye-catching touch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
